Alright, so we are back at the order page and I'm going to show you very quickly what to do if someone wants to get a 3-6 or 12-month package. So we're going to select the product, last minute cleanse. We're going to say this person wants a 6-month supply of last minute cleanse. Alright, you'll notice that it auto adjusts to the 6-month price. This is actually significantly less because it shows it goes from $3.57 to $3.21. But the reality is that 6 months of $97 would have been $600 versus $3.21. So they're getting like 50% off, which is a very attractive and steep discount. Okay, now just as a reminder, anytime that you are ordering from here where you have a 3-6 or 12-month package, there is no recurring component whatsoever. They are getting a big discount for paying in full upfront and they're going to get a box with 6, 3-6 or 12 of that exact same item. So this box that we are ordering right now would have 6 bottles of last minute cleanse. Alright, so we've now added this to our cart. You can see it says quantity one, but it's 6 months supply, which means there are 6. So I just want anyone to get fooled by that. There are 6, that's why the cost is 3.21 and the discount has already been applied. Now you're going to select the shipping rate, which is going to be 99. Then we'll go to the next page and then you will fill this out as you did in the last one and the shipping cost will populate as soon as you put in the billing details. Make sure again that the shipping address and the billing address are correct. I can't say many times like this can get messed up. Do not mess up where they are putting, like where they actually wanted to get shipped and make sure that the billing and the shipping are the right one so we don't send it to their parents house or something crazy. Alright, fill it out, place the order and then it will take you back to the order page.
